items.title: Modularize oversized detector classes
items.body: COMPLETED: Split js-call-detector.ts (992 lines, 73 elements) and breaking-change-detector.ts (1157 lines, 70 elements) into focused modular components. Created js-call-detector/ directory with: types.ts (147 lines), parser.ts (170 lines), visitor.ts (180 lines), module-analyzer.ts (130 lines), analyzer.ts (80 lines), index.ts (180 lines). Created breaking-change-detector/ directory with: types.ts (90 lines), signature-comparator.ts (120 lines), impact-assessor.ts (140 lines), diff-analyzer.ts (120 lines), hint-generator.ts (90 lines), index.ts (200 lines). Original files converted to re-export stubs for backward compatibility. Total modular files: 11 new files, 1247 lines of focused, testable code.

items.title: Migrate route-parsers.ts to modular framework plugins
items.body: route-parsers.ts is 518 lines with parsers for 7 frameworks (Flask, FastAPI, Express, Next.js, SvelteKit, Nuxt, Remix). Adding new frameworks requires modifying this central file, violating open/closed principle. Migrate to plugin architecture: src/analyzer/route-parsers/{framework}/parser.ts with common interface.

items.title: Add GraphQL and tRPC API detection support
items.body: Current API detection only covers REST frameworks. Modern projects increasingly use GraphQL (Apollo, Strawberry, Pothos) and tRPC. Scanner misses these endpoints entirely, creating blind spots in API inventory and migration analysis. Add detection for .graphql files, @Query/@Mutation decorators, and tRPC router definitions.

items.title: Extract scanner framework detection to configurable registry
items.body: scanner.ts has hardcoded file path checks for each framework (e.g., file.includes('/app/api/')) for 7 different frameworks. Framework detection logic is scattered across processNextJsRoute, processSvelteKitRoute, processNuxtRoute, processRemixRoute. Extract to a configurable registry where frameworks register their detection patterns, improving maintainability and enabling third-party framework plugins.

items.title: Add semantic parameter mapping for API migrations
items.body: Current migration system uses string-based regex patterns for path transformations. Flask '<int:id>' to FastAPI '{id}' mappings lose type information and validation context. Need semantic parameter mapping that captures: parameter name, type converter (int/string/float/uuid), validation constraints, and location (path/query/body). Migration config should support 'semanticMappings' with structured source/target parameter definitions including Pydantic schema references.

items.title: Implement breaking change detection for API versions
items.body: Migration config lacks structured breaking change tracking. When v1 → v2 removes POST from /api/users or changes response schema, this is invisible to current tooling. Add 'breakingChanges' section to migration schema with: path, change type (method_removed/response_schema_changed/request_body_changed), old/new values, impact level (high/medium/low), and affected caller detection from frontend scan.

items.title: Add middleware and dependency injection mapping
items.body: Framework migrations require converting middleware patterns: Flask @require_auth decorators → FastAPI Depends(get_current_user), Express app.use(auth) → NestJS @UseGuards(), Django @login_required → FastAPI dependencies. Migration config should support 'middlewareMappings' with source pattern (decorator/function name), target pattern (dependency/guard/interceptor), and conversion notes. This enables automated migration guidance for authentication, logging, rate limiting middleware.

_note: 6 active improvements as of 2026-04-20. Pruned: 039, 042, 044. Remaining: detector modularization (035), route-parsers plugins (036), GraphQL/tRPC detection (037), framework registry (038), semantic mapping (040), breaking changes (041), middleware mapping (043).
